sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12318" key="a)po/brwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόβρωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">something deuoured,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
